About

Hello

My name is Philip Ekholm. I'm a Software Engineer based in Malmö, Sweden, currently working at IKEA (Ingka Group). I enjoy building things that live at the intersection of code and creativity.

Outside of work, I spend my time on side projects, road trips across Scandinavia, and exploring new technologies. I'm drawn to clean design, well-crafted software, and solving interesting problems.

What I do

I work across the full stack, from backend services and infrastructure to frontend interfaces. I'm particularly interested in cloud-native development, developer tooling, and making complex systems approachable.

Get in touch

Feel free to reach out via email or connect with me on LinkedIn and GitHub.

GitHub LinkedIn Email
